lines.en_lit: a firstborn or tithe, takes effect on a permanently blemished animal, and cannot vacate non-sacred to be sheared and to be worked. Rather, not teaching category of sacrifices,
And what is different Substitution is one category, sacrifices, there is a firstborn and there is tithe,

And Rav Sheshet, rather than establishing as the ram of Aaron, let him establish with the Paschal offering, which overrides Shabbat and ritual impurity and perform substitution as is the offering of an individual. maintains not slaughter the Paschal lamb on behalf of an individual,
And let establish to the second Pesaḥ, Does override ritual impurity?

Rav Huna, son of Rav Yehoshua, said to Rava: And tanna what is different the Paschal offering, that he calls it the offering an individual? And what is different Festival peace-offering, that he calls it a communal offering? If because is brought by a multitude, the Paschal offering is also brought by a multitude, There is the second Pesaḥ, which is not brought by a multitude,

He said to him: If so, it should override Shabbat and ritual impurity. He said to him: Yes, in accordance with the one who said overrides As it was taught The second Pesaḥ overrides Shabbat, but it does not override ritual impurity. Rabbi Yehuda says: even overrides ritual impurity. What is the reason of the first tanna? said to you because ritual impurity overrode his And he perform second Pesaḥ in ritual impurity?

And Rabbi Yehuda said to you the verse states: “According to all the statute of the Paschal offering they shall keep it” even in ritual impurity, The Torah sought for to perform it in ritual purity; he did not merit he should perform it in ritual impurity.
